about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Toan Thang Engineering Joint Stock Company is a leading provider of technology solutions for the oil and gas industry
about.missionDesc: To provide high-quality products and services that help partners improve operational efficiency and achieve their business goals.
about.visionDesc: To become the leading technology partner in Vietnam's industrial sector and the region.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Join Toan Thang Engineering — Where engineering meets passion

lifeAtTTE.title: Life at TTE
lifeAtTTE.subtitle: We build a work culture where every individual can grow and create real impact

purpose.label: Our Purpose
purpose.title: We exist to solve the most complex engineering challenges in Vietnam's industrial sector
purpose.body: For over 30 years, every engineer at TTE has played an essential role in ensuring the safety and performance of refineries, drilling rigs, and energy systems across Vietnam.

items.title: Integrity
items.desc: Transparency in every commitment to clients and partners

items.title: Excellence
items.desc: We don't stop at good enough — we pursue the highest standard

items.title: Innovation
items.desc: Applying advanced technology to create better solutions

items.title: Safety
items.desc: Safety is the top priority in every task

items.title: Ownership
items.desc: Own your work — every person is accountable for results

people.label: Our People
people.body: TTE brings together over 100 engineers and specialists trained by world-leading manufacturers like Emerson, Flowserve, and Cooper. We are proud of our continuous learning environment and clear growth opportunities.

women.label: Women at TTE
women.body: TTE is committed to building an equal and inclusive environment. We create conditions for female engineers to advance and take on technical leadership roles.

testimonials.name: Nguyen Minh Khoa
testimonials.quote: TTE gave me the chance to work directly on national-scale projects like NSRP. The knowledge I accumulated here cannot be learned in any classroom.

testimonials.name: Tran Thi Thu Ha
testimonials.quote: The environment at TTE is very open. I was supported to obtain international certifications and lead independent projects after just 2 years.

testimonials.name: Le Cong Dinh
testimonials.quote: From a young engineer to project manager — TTE is where I grew up professionally. The company always invests in people, not just technology.

whyTTE.title: Why Choose TTE?
whyTTE.subtitle: We provide the environment for you to become the best version of yourself

benefits.title: Competitive Compensation
benefits.desc: Merit-based salary, performance bonuses, and project bonuses

benefits.title: Comprehensive Insurance
benefits.desc: Premium health insurance for you and your family

benefits.title: In-Depth Training
benefits.desc: International certifications from Emerson, Flowserve; training at partner facilities

benefits.title: Clear Career Path
benefits.desc: Defined roadmap from junior to senior engineer and management

benefits.title: Travel & Team Building
benefits.desc: Annual trips and regular team bonding programs

benefits.title: Flexible Environment
benefits.desc: Flexible hours, modern workspace in HCM City and Vung Tau

whyTTE.cultureHighlight: A work culture where everyone's voice is heard — from new engineers to the board of directors.
